user.title: Set up Cambridge Audio
user.description: Choose your Cambridge Audio model and the IR emitter to send commands through.

data.infrared_receiver_entity_id: IR receiver (optional, enables remote press events)

cxn.title: CXN system code
cxn.description: Select the RC-5 system code your CXN is set to (Settings menu on the device). Most units use 24.

abort.no_emitters: No IR emitters found. First set up an IR transmitter (for example an ESPHome IR blaster) via Settings → Devices & Services.
